enforced: ESLint flat config only (eslint.config.mjs, forced ESM regardless of the consuming project's package.json "type"); legacy .eslintrc* is not read by ESLint v10+
eqeqeq, no-var, no-unused-vars, no-implicit-coercion, prefer-const are machine-enforced errors
tsconfig noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true — indexed array/object access is typed as possibly undefined
tsconfig noImplicitOverride: true — subclass overrides must use the override keyword
tsconfig exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true — optional properties cannot be assigned undefined explicitly unless declared
Prettier formatting (semi, singleQuote, trailingComma, printWidth) is machine-enforced, not prose style guidance
note: React/Vue/etc. framework lint plugins are appended by sync.mjs when the corresponding frontend stack is detected; this baseline is plain JS/TS.
